description: The MissingComponent component is used to signify that a component previously saved on a slot no longer exists inside of Resonite. seeing this component is rare due to the backwards compatibility of Resonite. This component does not have any active functionality.

fields.Type: The string version of a Type of the removed or depreciated component.
fields.Data: The data of the missing component.

usage: This component will appear on content sometimes. Replace the component with an equivalent or more up to date method, then delete this component.
